signals.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
signals.desc: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

signals.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
signals.desc: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

signals.title: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
signals.desc: China's leading AI companies are ramping up the pressure on Silicon Valley, as Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled models they claim can go toe-to-toe with the best from OpenAI and Anthropic at a fraction of the cost. The rapid-fire releases suggest America's lead at the AI frontier is increasingly tight, just as the technology is becoming […]

signals.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
signals.desc: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […

signals.title: Introducing Claude Corps
Anthropic launches Claude Tag, a tool that works like a virtual employee within Slack
Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
signals.desc: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot wrappers, the control plane enterprises expect is deliberately hybrid to avoid lo

signals.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
signals.desc: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

signals.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
signals.desc: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

signals.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
signals.desc: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

signals.desc: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

signals.title: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
signals.desc: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app is now being updated with a suite of generative AI tools. And the change doesn't rely upon Adobe's own Firefly AI models. Adobe describes the […]

signals.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
signals.desc: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

signals.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
signals.desc: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

signals.desc: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

signals.title: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
signals.desc: Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpriced - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does […]

signals.title: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
signals.desc: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. New research suggests that LLMs can also develop their own biases from…

signals.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
signals.desc: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

signals.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
signals.desc: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

signals.title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
signals.desc: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.

signals.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show

Anthropic—currently the world’s most valuable AI company, with a nearly $1 trillion valuation—has a reputation for publishing strange and heady research. It’s looking into whether AI models can feel pain, for example,…

signals.desc: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

signals.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
signals.desc: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.

signals.title: A scorecard for the AI age
signals.desc: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

signals.title: Introducing the Codex Micro
signals.desc: See how the Codex Micro, a customizable keyboard built with Work Louder for Codex, helps you move through a build without leaving your flow. In this demo, GPT-5.6 Sol creates a word game while the Micro handles voice dictation, task switching, reasoning controls, permission requests, and follow-up prompts. Get yours: https://openai.com/supply/ Chapters: 00:00 Introducing the Codex Micro 00:24 Voic
